start_welcome: 👋 Welcome, {display_name}! I'm your coordination bot. I help organize group events with AI-powered scheduling. 💡 Use the menu buttons below to navigate instead of typing commands! Quick commands: /plan - Start planning an event /organize_event - Create a new event /events - List recent events /my_groups - List your groups /profile - View your profile /how_am_i_doing - See your participation mirror
start_private_availability:
📥 Private Availability Mode

Event ID: {event_id}

Submit your free slots from DM using:
/constraints {event_id} availability <YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM,YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM>

Example:
/constraints {event_id} availability 2026-03-20 18:00,2026-03-21 10:30
start_session_unavailable: ℹ️ User session data is unavailable.
start_only_in_group: ℹ️ This command can only be used in a Telegram group.
about_description: Help your group organize events with AI-powered scheduling. No more back-and-forth DMs. Just tap, join, and show up. How it works: • Create events with /events → Create New Event • Tap buttons to join, commit, or enrich • Set constraints privately (if X joins, I join) • Memories accumulate across events — the group remembers Creator: {creator} Username: @{bot_username} Built with care for groups that value real connection over noise.
main_menu_welcome: 🏠 Main Menu Choose an option below: 📋 My Events - View and manage your events 👤 My Profile - Check your stats 📜 History - Browse your event history ✏️ Organize - Create a new event 🔧 Modify - Modify an existing event 👥 Groups - View your groups ❓ Help - Get help and tips
events_no_events: ℹ️ No events found yet. 💡 Create your first event to get started!
events_no_events_in_group:
ℹ️ No events found in this group.

You may not be a member yet. Contact a group admin.
events_tap_hint: 💡 Tap any event above to view details, or create a new one
event_creation_description_prompt: 📝 Event Description Send a short description for the event. Example: Friendly football match at the central field.
event_creation_description_prompt_public: 📝 Event Description Send a short description for the event. Mode: {mode_text} Example: Friendly football match at the central field. Most next steps are one-tap inline options.
event_creation_description_empty: ℹ️ Description cannot be empty. Please send a short description.
event_creation_description_too_long: ℹ️ Description is too long. Keep it under 500 characters.
event_creation_date_preset_prompt: 📅 Quick Date Selection Choose a date preset:
event_creation_date_custom_prompt: 📅 Custom Date Select a date from the inline calendar:
event_creation_date_resolution_failed: ℹ️ Could not resolve that date preset. Please try again.
event_creation_time_invalid_format: ℹ️ Invalid time format. Please use: HH:MM
event_creation_time_date_missing: ℹ️ Event date is missing. Please pick date again.
event_creation_time_parse_failed: ℹ️ Could not parse selected time.
event_creation_time_selected: ⏱️ Time: {time} What's the minimum number of people this needs to happen?
event_creation_threshold_prompt: 👥 Participation Minimum Set the minimum people needed:
event_creation_min_prompt: ✅ Minimum: {min_val} How many people can this comfortably fit? (Default: {target})
event_creation_invite_custom_prompt: ✍️ Custom Invitees Enter comma-separated handles. Example: @alice, @bob_builder Or send @all
event_creation_invite_invalid:
ℹ️ Invalid handle list. Use comma-separated @handles.
Example: @alice, @bob_builder
Or use: @all
event_creation_final_prompt:
🛠 Send your modification in natural language.

Examples:
- Change time to 2026-03-10 19:30
- Make duration 90 minutes
- Increase the minimum to 5
- Set location to outdoor and budget to low
- Add @alice and remove @bob
event_creation_session_expired: ℹ️ Event setup session expired. Please run /organize_event again.
event_creation_no_modification: ⚠️ I could not apply any clear modification. Try specific edits like: set time to 2026-03-10 19:30.
event_creation_send_modification_hint: ℹ️ Send text modifications, or press Confirm/Discard.
event_creation_draft_from_context:
🤖 I prepared an event draft from recent chat context.
Review and confirm or modify:
event_created_group: ✅ Event Created! Event ID: {event_id} Description: {description} A private DM has been sent to group members with full event details and next steps.
event_created_flexible_tip:
Flexible flow tip:
Each attendee can add availability slots with:
/constraints {event_id} availability <YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM, ...>
event_created_no_invitees: ℹ️ For private events, please specify invitees. Use @username (comma-separated).
event_status_progress_needs: ⚠️ Still needs {needed} more to reach the minimum ({confirmed}/{threshold}).
event_status_mutual_confirmed:
🤝 You are one of {total} active participants.
   {others} other participant{'s' if others > 1 else ''} currently in.
event_status_mutual_joined:
🤝 You are one of {total} interested participants.
   Confirm when you're ready to move from interested to committed.
event_constraints_empty: No constraints or availability set yet.
event_panel_invalid_callback: ❌ Invalid callback. Please use /events to see your events.
event_panel_unknown_action: ❓ Unknown action: {action}. Please use /events to see your events.
event_panel_relinquish_not_joined: ℹ️ You're not joined to this event.
event_panel_relinquish_must_uncommit: You must uncommit before leaving. Tap 'You're Confirmed' to uncommit first.
event_panel_commit_must_join: ❌ You must join the event before committing.
event_panel_lock_not_confirmed: ❌ Can only lock when state is 'confirmed'. Current: {state}
event_panel_lock_not_organizer: ❌ Only the organizer can lock an event.
event_panel_unlock_not_locked: ❌ Can only unlock when state is 'locked'. Current: {state}
event_panel_unlock_not_organizer: ❌ Only the organizer can unlock an event.
enrich_menu_description: Add ideas, hashtags, or memories to make this event better. - Ideas: Suggest activities, locations, or preparations - Hashtags: Tag the event for easy discovery - Memories: Share moments from past similar events Your ideas are visible to the organizer. Hashtags become public when 2+ people add the same tag.
enrich_add_idea_prompt: 💡 Add Idea to Event #{event_id} Reply with your idea (max 300 characters). Example: 'Bring a portable speaker for music' Your idea will be visible to the organizer.
enrich_add_hashtag_prompt: #️⃣ Add Hashtag to Event #{event_id} Reply with your hashtag (max 3 per event). Examples: #hiking, #weekend, #birthday Hashtags become public on the live card when 2+ people add the same tag.
enrich_add_memory_prompt: 📝 Add Memory to Event #{event_id} Share a memory from a similar past event (max 200 words). Memories are private until assembled into a mosaic when the event completes.
enrich_no_contributions: You haven't added any contributions to this event yet.
enrich_idea_save_success: ✅ Idea saved! (visible to organizer until event locks)
enrich_hashtag_save_success: ✅ Hashtag saved! Hashtags become public on the live card when 2+ people add the same tag.
enrich_memory_save_success: ✅ Memory saved! (private until mosaic assembles when event completes)
enrich_constraint_save_success: ✅ Constraint saved! The organizer will see it on the event.
enrich_time_suggestion_save_success: ✅ Time suggestion saved! The organizer will see your preferred time.
constraint_menu_description: Set conditions for your participation: - If X joins: I'll join if specific people do - Unless X joins: I'm in unless specific people come - Time preferences: Suggest or negotiate the time Constraints help coordinate complex group decisions.
constraint_add_prompt: 📅 Add Constraint to Event #{event_id} Reply with the username of who you're waiting for. Format: @username Example: 'If @alice joins, I'll join too'
constraint_add_unless_prompt: ❌ Add 'Unless' Constraint to Event #{event_id} Reply with the username of who you'd rather not attend. Format: @username Example: 'Unless @bob comes, I'm in'
constraint_suggest_time_prompt: 🕐 Suggest Time for Event #{event_id} Reply with your preferred time. Examples: - 'Saturday at 7pm' - 'Sunday morning' - 'Anytime after 5pm'
profile_not_found: 👤 Your Profile No profile data yet. Join events to build your participation history.
profile_identity_note:
This profile is identity-only.
The bot does not compute reliability, reputation, or scores about you.
Use /how_am_i_doing for your private attendance mirror.
my_groups_empty:
• No groups yet.

Run /organize_event in a group once to register it.
my_history_dm_only:
🔒 This command is only available in direct messages.

Please message me privately for your personal history.
my_history_not_registered:
You're not registered yet.
Use /start to register.
my_history_empty:
📜 Your Event History

No events yet! Join your first event to start building your story.

Use /events to see upcoming events.
my_history_empty_filtered:
No {event_type} events in your history yet.

Use /my_history to see all events.
my_history_footer: Your history is private — never shown to others. Use /my_history [type] to filter by event type.
attendance_mirror_not_found: 📊 Your Participation No events found yet. Join an event to see your counts here.
cancel_event_id_invalid: ❌ Event ID must be a number.
cancel_event_locked: ❌ Cannot cancel event {event_id} - it's already locked.
cancel_not_joined: ❌ You haven't joined event {event_id} yet. Nothing to cancel.
cancel_nudge: Event {event_id} ({event_type}) is upcoming. Your response helps everyone plan.
back_event_id_invalid: ❌ Event ID must be a number.
back_event_locked: ❌ Event is locked. Cannot go back.
back_not_confirmed: ℹ️ You are not confirmed in this event.
request_confirmations_event_id_invalid: ℹ️ Event ID must be a number.
request_confirmations_dm_sent: ℹ️ Final-confirmation DM sent to {sent}/{total} attendees.
modify_event_usage:
Usage: /modify_event <event_id> <changes>

Example: /modify_event 12 change time to 2026-03-08 18:30 and minimum to 5
modify_event_event_id_invalid: ❌ Event ID must be a number.
modify_event_terminal_state: ❌ Event {event_id} is {state}; modification is not allowed.
modify_event_no_changes: ⚠️ No valid event change inferred from your message.
modify_event_no_admin: ❌ Could not identify event admin to approve modification request.
modify_event_admin_dm_failed: ⚠️ Could not send DM to admin. Please check your privacy settings.
modify_event_only_admin: Only the event admin can approve/reject this request.
modify_event_rejected: ❌ Modify request for event {event_id} was rejected by admin.
modify_event_requester_rejected: ❌ Your modify request for event {event_id} was rejected by the event admin.
modify_event_no_inferred_changes:
⚠️ No valid event change inferred from your approval.

The modification request may not contain clear, specific changes.
Try asking the requester to be more specific about what they want to change.
modify_event_requester_approved:
✅ Your modify request for event {event_id} was approved by the event admin.
Changed fields: {fields}
suggest_time_event_id_invalid: ❌ Event ID must be a number.
suggest_time_requesting: 🤖 Requesting new AI time suggestion for event {event_id}...
suggest_time_applied: ✅ Applied this suggested time to the event.
memory_event_id_invalid: Event ID must be a number.
memory_no_weave:
No memory weave yet for this {event_type}.

(Memories are collected within 24 hours after the event.)
recall_group_not_registered:
This group is not registered yet.
Use /start to register.
recall_no_memories:
No memory weaves yet.

Memories will appear here after events complete.
remember_usage:
Usage: /remember [event_id] [your memory]

Example: /remember 123 The moment when everyone laughed at the rain
remember_too_short: Please share a bit more detail (at least 3 characters).
remember_success:
✓ Memory added!

Thank you for sharing. This will be woven into the group's memory of the event.
digest_no_activity:
No activity this week.

Memories and events will appear here as your group becomes more active!
digest_events_not_found: No events found for this group.
digest_memories_not_found: No memories found for this group.
preferences_not_set: 📋 Your Preferences You haven't set any preferences yet. Set your preferences using: /preferences time /preferences activity /preferences budget /preferences location /preferences transport Or use /preferences wizard to set up your profile.
preferences_wizard_title: 🤖 Preference Setup Wizard Let's set up your preferences for better event matching! First, what time of day do you prefer for events? Please select:
preferences_usage:
Usage: /preferences <type> <value>

Types: time, activity, budget, location, transport
Example: /preferences time evening
preferences_user_not_found: ❌ User not found. Please start the bot first.
waitlist_offer_expired: ❌ This offer has expired or is no longer available.
waitlist_extend_deadline_success:
✅ Deadline extended for the {event_type}.
New collapse time: {time}.
waitlist_extend_deadline_group: ⏳ The {event_type} deadline has been extended. New collapse time: {time}.
waitlist_only_organizer_extend: ❌ Only the organizer can extend the deadline.
waitlist_only_organizer_view: ❌ Only the organizer can view the waitlist.
waitlist_view_empty:
📋 Waitlist for {event_type}:

No one on the waitlist.
waitlist_joined: ✅ You're on the waitlist for the event (position #{position}). You'll be notified if a spot opens.
menu_my_events_no_events: ℹ️ No Events Found You haven't joined any events yet. Use the menu below to get started!
menu_my_events_tap_hint: 💡 Tap a button below to view event details
menu_event_detail_hint: 💡 Use the buttons below to interact with this event
menu_help_start: 📖 Getting Started Welcome to the Coordination Bot! • Use Organize Event to create events • Browse My Events to see your events • Tap an event to join or manage it • Set your Availability to help scheduling The bot uses AI to find optimal times for everyone!
menu_help_events: 🎯 How Events Work 1. Proposed - Event is gathering interest 2. Interested - People have joined 3. Confirmed - Enough people committed 4. Locked - Event is finalized 5. Completed - Event happened! You need to reach the threshold number of confirmations to lock an event.
menu_help_scheduling: 📅 Scheduling • Events can have fixed or flexible times • Use Set Availability to share your free slots • The bot suggests optimal times • More availability = better scheduling!
menu_redirect_profile:
Your Profile

Please use /profile command to view your full profile and stats.
menu_redirect_history:
Your History

Please use /my_history command to view your event timeline.
menu_redirect_organize: ✏️ Organize Event Choose the type of event you want to create: • Public / Group Event — Shared with the group, everyone can join • Private Event — Only you can see and manage it
menu_redirect_modify:
Modify Event

Please use /modify_event <event_id> command to modify an event.

Or select an event from My Events and use the Modify button.
menu_redirect_groups:
Your Groups

Please use /my_groups command to view your groups.
menu_create_new_event: 🌟 Let's create something together What brings you here? • Plan something specific — You have an idea in mind • Just exploring ideas — Open to suggestions 💡 Your intent shapes what we build
enrichment_idea_saved: ✅ Idea saved! (visible to organizer until event locks)
enrichment_hashtag_saved: ✅ Hashtag saved! Hashtags become public on the live card when 2+ people add the same tag.
enrichment_memory_saved: ✅ Memory saved! (private until mosaic assembles when event completes)
enrichment_constraint_saved: ✅ Constraint saved! The organizer will see it on the event.
enrichment_time_saved: ✅ Time suggestion saved! The organizer will see your preferred time.
enrichment_error: ❌ Sorry, something went wrong. Please try /events again.
event_creation_public_only: ℹ️ This command can only be used in a Telegram group.
mention_no_active_events: No active events in this group yet. Mention me to create one, or use /organize_event.
mention_opinion_response:
🤖 {response}

_Want me to turn this into an event, or see what's already planned?_
mention_approval_expired: ⚠️ This approval request has been expired.
mention_approval_only_mentioned: Only participants mentioned in the request can approve/reject.
mention_approval_declined: ℹ️ Action declined because one participant stepped back.
mention_help_tips: ❓ Tips • Mention me with a clear ask. • When I list events, tap a row to pick one. • Use /organize_event to start a structured setup.
mention_modification_expired: ℹ️ This modification request has been expired.
mention_modification_write_prompt: ✏️ Please type your modification request below: Describe the changes you want to make. Examples: - Change time to March 8, 2026 at 18:00 - Increase minimum to 4 and capacity to 10 - Move location to gym Type 'cancel' to abort.

mention_participation_confirm: ✅ Confirmed for event {event_id}. Event state is now confirmed.

format_scheduled_time_not_scheduled: Not yet scheduled (use /suggest_time to find optimal time)

event_presenter_next_step_confirmed: Organizer can lock the event when ready.
event_presenter_next_step_terminal: Event is in a terminal/locked stage.
weekly_digest_activity_summary: 📊 Activity Summary • Events completed: {completed} • Events created: {created} • Active participants: {participants} • Total confirmations: {confirmations}

- Move location to gym

Type 'cancel' to abort.
